Bash(cd /Users/nazir/donna/src-tauri/icons && sips -z 32 32 icon.png --out 32x32.png && sips -z 256 256 icon.png --out 128x128@2x.png && echo "Done")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

SIZE = 1024

# Use the actual brand logo exactly as designed
logo = Image.open\("/Users/nazir/donna/src-tauri/icons/donna-monogram-light.png"\).convert\("RGBA"\)

# Resize to fill the full canvas \(the logo already has its own background\)
canvas = logo.resize\(\(SIZE, SIZE\), Image.LANCZOS\)

# Apply macOS squircle mask — corner radius ~22.4% of size
mask_img = Image.new\("L", \(SIZE, SIZE\), 0\)
mask_draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask_img\)
radius = int\(SIZE * 0.224\)
mask_draw.rounded_rectangle\([0, 0, SIZE - 1, SIZE - 1], radius=radius, fill=255\)
canvas.putalpha\(mask_img\)

canvas.save\("/Users/nazir/donna/src-tauri/icons/icon.png"\)
print\("Done"\)
EOF
qlmanage -t -s 512 -o /tmp /Users/nazir/donna/src-tauri/icons/icon.png 2>/dev/null)
